anpTerm: Landing Light LED Driver Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual brightness test; measure lumens if available
notes: LED dims to 70% lumens at 50000 h; total failure by 80000 h.

anpTerm: Taxi Light LED Driver Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual brightness test during daytime taxi
notes: LED dims to 70% lumens at 50000 h; total failure by 80000 h.

displayName: Position Light Bulb Red (Left Wing Tip) Hours
anpTerm: Position Light Bulb Red Left Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual check during preflight; test during night flight
notes: Filament lamp 1000 h MTBF; must function for night ops.

displayName: Position Light Bulb Green (Right Wing Tip) Hours
anpTerm: Position Light Bulb Green Right Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual check during preflight; test during night flight
notes: Filament lamp 1000 h MTBF; required for night operations.

anpTerm: Position Light Bulb White Tail Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual check during preflight; test during night flight
notes: Filament lamp 1000 h MTBF; critical for night ops visibility.

anpTerm: Strobe Light Xenon Tube Flash Count Left
inspectionMethod: Visual check in dim light; electrical test for tube voltage
notes: Xenon tube rated 30 million flashes (~5000 h at 1 Hz duty).

anpTerm: Strobe Light Xenon Tube Flash Count Right
inspectionMethod: Visual check in dim light; electrical test for tube voltage
notes: Xenon tube rated 30 million flashes (~5000 h at 1 Hz duty).

anpTerm: Strobe PSU High-Voltage Capacitor ESR
inspectionMethod: ESR meter test of reservoir capacitor; functional strobe timing check
notes: Rising ESR degrades pulse energy and flash brightness; thermal cycling accelerates drift.

anpTerm: Beacon Light LED Driver Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual brightness check during daylight preflight; night test for red glow
notes: LED dims to 70% lumens at 50000 h; total failure by 80000 h.

displayName: Instrument Panel Post-Light Dimming Pot Wear
anpTerm: Panel Light Rheostat Wiper Contact Wear
inspectionMethod: Rotate dimmer knob through full range; check for scratches/discontinuity
notes: Repeated dimming cycles cause wiper wear; flicker indicates imminent pot failure.

anpTerm: Map Light Bulb Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection; test switch in dark cabin
notes: Standard incandescent 1000 h life; low criticality for ops.

anpTerm: Dome Light Bulb Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection; test overhead switch
notes: Standard incandescent bulb; used for cabin illumination during preflight.

anpTerm: Glareshield Flood Light Bulb Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual check at night; inspect bulb socket for corrosion
notes: Filament lamp providing general cockpit ambient light during night ops.

displayName: Fuel Sump Drain Inspection Light Hours
anpTerm: Fuel Sump Inspection Light Bulb Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Test with master on during preflight fuel sumping
notes: Optional feature on some C172 models; aids fuel contamination inspection.

anpTerm: Pitot Tube Heating Element DC Resistance
inspectionMethod: Ohmmeter test of pitot heat element with power off; functional test during flight
notes: Open-circuit (>100 Ω) or short (<1 Ω) triggers failure; thermal cycling causes drift.

anpTerm: Pitot Mast Drain Port Blockage Status
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection with borescope; test drain flow with compressed air
notes: Blockage from ice, dirt, or corrosion allows water trap formation in pitot line.

anpTerm: Pitot Tubing Condensation Water Content
inspectionMethod: Moisture trap inspection; borescope exam of internal tubing for visible droplets
notes: Water ingress from condensation or rain; freezes in flight causing IAS blockage.

displayName: Pitot Tube Ram-Air Port Screen Contamination
anpTerm: Pitot Probe Forward Port Screen Blockage
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of probe head; gentle air flush if safe
notes: Dirt, bugs, or ice accumulation reduces dynamic pressure sensing accuracy.

anpTerm: Static Port Paint Layer Thickness
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection; scribe or thickness gauge at static port rim
notes: Paint buildup causes static pressure error; can trigger ATC altitude bust.

anpTerm: Left Static Port Condition
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection for cracks, corrosion, or blockage; FAR 91.411 test
notes: Corrosion or contamination reduces patency; paired port design relies on both sides.

anpTerm: Static Tubing Condensation Water Content
inspectionMethod: Moisture trap inspection; visual check for water beads in tubing
notes: Water condenses in static line during climb/descent transitions; freezes in icing.

anpTerm: Static System FAR 91.411 Leak Test Rate
inspectionMethod: FAR 91.411 static system test; measure altitude loss at 1000 ft test altitude
notes: FAR 91.411 limit 100 ft/min at 1000 ft test alt; advisory 75 ft/min.

anpTerm: Alternate Static Port Selector Valve Seat Sealing
inspectionMethod: Manual valve actuation test; pressure hold check with plug
notes: Valve seat corrosion or debris allows leakage when closed; affects FAR 91.411 test.

anpTerm: Altitude Encoder Pressure-to-Altitude Conversion Accuracy
inspectionMethod: Functional altitude test against certified altimeter at known altitude
notes: Mode C altitude reporting requires ±100 ft accuracy; encoder drift causes ADS-B errors.

anpTerm: Vacuum Pump Rotor Vane 1 Thickness
inspectionMethod: Pump teardown; measure vane thickness with calipers
notes: Scrap limit 0.40 in; all four vanes must meet limit together. G1000 NXi may not use vacuum.

anpTerm: Vacuum Pump Rotor Vane 2 Thickness
inspectionMethod: Pump teardown; measure vane thickness with calipers
notes: Scrap limit 0.40 in; all four vanes must meet limit together. G1000 NXi may not use vacuum.

anpTerm: Vacuum Pump Rotor Vane 3 Thickness
inspectionMethod: Pump teardown; measure vane thickness with calipers
notes: Scrap limit 0.40 in; all four vanes must meet limit together. G1000 NXi may not use vacuum.

anpTerm: Vacuum Pump Rotor Vane 4 Thickness
inspectionMethod: Pump teardown; measure vane thickness with calipers
notes: Scrap limit 0.40 in; all four vanes must meet limit together. G1000 NXi may not use vacuum.

anpTerm: Vacuum Pump Shear Coupling Pin Condition
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of coupling pin; functional test of pump operation
notes: Safety coupling shears if pump jams to protect engine drive; replacement required if sheared.

anpTerm: Vacuum System Relief Valve Setpoint Accuracy
inspectionMethod: Functional suction test at sea level; measure and compare to gauge
notes: Setpoint ±0.2 in Hg nominal (4.8–5.2 in Hg); exceeding 5.2 in Hg can cause pump failure.

anpTerm: Vacuum Pump Inlet Filter Pressure Drop
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of filter element; measure suction delta-P across filter
notes: Replace filter when delta-P reaches 1.5 in Hg to maintain minimum system suction.

anpTerm: Vacuum System Hose Internal Wall Degradation
inspectionMethod: Hose inspection with borescope; apply vacuum and check for collapse
notes: Rubber aging and ozone exposure cause internal wall flaking; visual exterior check insufficient.

anpTerm: Vacuum System Pressure Gauge Accuracy
inspectionMethod: Functional test against calibrated test gauge at known suction setting
notes: Mechanical gauge pointer stiction or mechanical hysteresis causes drift; 24-month certification required.

anpTerm: Cabin Heat Scat Tube Visual Condition Score
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of scat tube exterior; check for cracks, rust, or separation
notes: Condition score 10 (new) to 0 (failed); replace at score 4 to prevent CO ingress.

displayName: Cabin Heat Scat Tube CO Leak Risk
anpTerm: Cabin Heat System Carbon Monoxide Ingress Probability
inspectionMethod: Sealing check with soapy water; CO detector response during engine run
notes: Cracked scat tube allows combustion exhaust gases to enter cabin; critical safety issue.

anpTerm: Cabin Heat Control Cable Tension and Travel
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of cable routing; test cabin heat control lever full travel
notes: Cable stretching or corrosion reduces actuator response; frayed cable requires replacement.

anpTerm: Windscreen Defrost Valve Seat Sealing
inspectionMethod: Manual valve test; check for unwanted hot air discharge when valve closed
notes: Valve seat corrosion or debris allows bypass leakage; impacts defrost effectiveness.

anpTerm: Left Fresh Air Vent Screen Debris Loading
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of external vent screen; test fresh air control lever operation
notes: Dirt, lint, or insects block vent screen reducing cabin fresh air flow.

anpTerm: Right Fresh Air Vent Screen Debris Loading
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of external vent screen; test fresh air control lever operation
notes: Dirt, lint, or insects block vent screen reducing cabin fresh air flow.

anpTerm: Outside Air Temperature Probe Accuracy
inspectionMethod: Temperature comparison against calibrated reference at cruise altitude
notes: OAT errors affect density altitude calculation and engine leaning decisions; ±2°C new, replace at ±5°C.

displayName: Carbon Monoxide Detector Electrochemical Cell Life
anpTerm: CO Detector Electrochemical Cell Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Check cell expiration date; test detector response to known CO source
notes: Electrochemical cell life 2 years regardless of use; expired cells fail to detect CO.

anpTerm: CO Detector Battery Voltage and Capacity
inspectionMethod: Battery voltage check; observe warning LED if equipped
notes: Some CO detectors powered separately; check battery during annual inspection.

anpTerm: COM1 Antenna Fuselage Penetration Seal Integrity
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of antenna base; check for water staining or corrosion
notes: Sealant degradation allows water ingress to antenna connector; causes intermittent TX/RX.

anpTerm: COM2 Antenna Fuselage Penetration Seal Integrity
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of antenna base; check for water staining or corrosion
notes: Sealant degradation allows water ingress to antenna connector; causes intermittent TX/RX.

displayName: GPS Antenna Seal and Element Gain
anpTerm: GPS Antenna Radome Seal and Element Radiation Pattern
inspectionMethod: Visual radome inspection; measure antenna VSWR with vector analyzer if available
notes: Radome water ingress increases VSWR and reduces gain; impacts precision approach capability.

anpTerm: Mode C Antenna Ground Plane Surface Condition
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection of fuselage ground plane around antenna; check for rust or corrosion
notes: Corroded ground plane causes VSWR mismatch and altitude encoding errors in ADS-B reports.

anpTerm: ADS-B Antenna Radome Seal Integrity
inspectionMethod: Visual radome inspection; check for moisture or separation
notes: Radome seal failure allows water intrusion affecting antenna impedance matching.

anpTerm: Emergency Locator Transmitter Antenna Structural Integrity
inspectionMethod: Visual inspection; gently flex antenna to check for cracks or brittleness
notes: ELT antenna whip embrittles from UV and cold; broken antenna impairs emergency signal transmission.

anpTerm: Distance Measuring Equipment Antenna Element Condition
inspectionMethod: Visual antenna inspection; functional DME range test from known station
notes: Optional equipment on some C172 models; antenna corrosion degrades DME acquisition range.

anpTerm: Master Caution Annunciator Bulb Operating Hours
inspectionMethod: Visual check; test lamp during preflight by actuating test switch
notes: Filament lamp 1000 h life; failure obscures caution panel alerting function.

anpTerm: Low Bus Voltage Alert Threshold Accuracy
inspectionMethod: Functional test with variable power supply; observe alert trigger point
notes: Electronic threshold drift causes false alerts or delayed low-voltage warning.

anpTerm: Fuel Tank Selector Valve Position Switch Contact Wear
inspectionMethod: Rotate fuel selector through all positions; observe indicator panel lamp changes
notes: Switch contact wear causes intermittent position indication; replacement required if unreliable.

anpTerm: Low Fuel Tank Level Alert Threshold Accuracy
inspectionMethod: Functional fuel quantity test against float level; measure alert actuation point
notes: Drift causes false low-fuel warnings or delayed alert; critical for flight planning accuracy.

anpTerm: Starter Engaged Indicator Lamp Status
inspectionMethod: Attempt engine start; observe indicator lamp illumination
notes: Optional equipment on some C172 models; not present on all variants.
